title: Station transformation and arrival phase
summary: After the home-place and feedback wave plus the first controller split, lane 1 should keep pushing tangible payoff. This phase deepens visible station transformation, then adds one more compact arrival-or-departure feel pass using existing seams.

execution_order.why_now: The home place should keep becoming more visibly shaped by the player's season.
A stronger visible evolution will make returns feel more earned.
The station should feel warmer, not denser.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the arrival or departure feel handoff.
execution_order.why_now: One more compact non-text pass can make the world feel more responsive.
Travel and returns should have more sensory punctuation without more text.
The new feedback should improve feel without crowding the shell.

main_230_focus.summary: Keep the station-transformation pass in the shared field-station shell instead of adding more nursery copy.
main_230_focus.preferred_surface: Use the field-station header, tab gutter, and lower panel edge as one tiny home-place accent band that shows on both SEASON and NURSERY.

main_231_focus.summary: Keep the feel pass on field-station arrival by animating the approved lower-shell accent instead of adding another static decoration or touching the world map.
main_231_focus.runtime_boundary: Set and tick a short arrival pulse in game.ts when the field station opens, then feed that value into overlay rendering.
main_231_focus.preferred_surface: Reuse the lower-shell sill / planter accent as the only animated surface.

guardrails: No new station page or dashboard.
Prefer visible state, motion, and punctuation over more copy.
